agents.name: schema
agents.rules: Use Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL dialect. snake_case columns. Every table: id (uuid), created_at, updated_at.

agents.name: dal
agents.role: Data access layer using TanStack Query
agents.rules: TanStack Query for all data fetching. One hook file per entity. All mutations invalidate parent queries.

agents.name: bl
agents.role: Business logic via Next.js Server Actions
agents.rules: Server Actions only, no API routes. Zod validation on every input.

agents.name: ui
agents.rules: shadcn/ui components only. cn() for className merging. No inline styles.

agents.name: reviewer
agents.rules: Review all generated code for correctness, consistency, and best practices.
